title: Solo Bridges
description: Adds a solo bridge item! A bridge that only works for YOU!
body:
### **This mod adds solo bridges**

**How does that work?**

**This great mod adds an item. Right clicking this item gives you some time with your own solo bridge! This bridge will automatically place under you and nowhere else! A singular block over a period of time, following you. That is why it is called solo bridges.**

Did you know that **the item has recipes** to make in survival mode?

This mod was made by the youtuber Vision - 
[YouTube Link](https://www.youtube.com/@Vision_Minecraft/featured)
